name: Sinosoft Co.,Ltd
summary: Sinosoft Co.,Ltd. engages in the research and development of computer software. The company focuses on industry application software development covering application software, supporting software, system integration, and other application levels. It provides its solutions in the areas of property insurance, life insurance, health care, governments, financial sector, and call centers, as well as media, energy, postal, traffic, and civil aviation fields; and discipline inspection, enterprise information, and agent products. The company was founded in 1996 and is based in Beijing, China.
